steps.title: Follow the process order
steps.content: The passage describes ebru as a sequence: first the tray is filled, next inks or paints are added, and then paper is slipped through the liquid to transfer the design.

steps.title: Signal the last step
steps.content: A would signal correction, B would signal a consequence, and C would signal contrast. The needed transition marks the final step in the procedure after "First" and "Next." The answer is D.
